title: solanum nigrum subvar. ochroleucum
intro: Solanum nigrum subvar. ochroleucum, also known as white bittersweet nightshade, is a subvariety of the Solanum nigrum plant, a member of the nightshade family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subvar. ochroleucum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
